text:
BOTTOM LINE — Broad risk-off with deep tech-led weakness. Small caps outperformed large, but all major indices fell as oil surged and both semis and consumer discretionary stocks got hammered, confirming a defensive rotation out of growth and into energy and value.

INDICES — VIX 18.8, up 2.2%. SOXX -1.64%, IWM -0.52%, DIA -0.77%, SPY -0.99%, QQQ -1.50%. Small > large by 0.47pp. Notable cross-asset move: USO +3.91% as oil rose on US blockade restart. SPY and QQQ are above their 200-day MAs.

VOLUME — SPY vol_ratio 0.7x, QQQ vol_ratio 0.9x — both showing declining volume, implying low-conviction selling in the broader market. Elevated volume in SOXX 1.7x (distribution, price down) and XLY 1.4x (distribution, price down).

SECTORS & ROTATION — XLE Energy +1.16%, XLRE Real Estate -0.09%, XLI Industrials -0.41%, XLV Healthcare -0.44%, XLU Utilities -0.66%, XLB Materials -0.71%, XLP Staples -0.72%, XLF Financials -0.86%, XLK Technology -1.09%, XLY Discretionary -1.62%, XLC Comms -1.78%. Top industries: USO +3.91%, MSOS +2.29%. Bottom industries: IHI -3.24%, JETS -2.53%. Money rotating out of tech and discretionary into energy — explicit rotation state: 'narrow mega-cap tape'

POSITIONING — SPY put-call ratio 0.79 is low, near-complacent. QQQ PCR 1.03 elevated, showing protection demand in tech. QQQ IV skew +12.6% signals high put premium and fear. VIX at 18.8, above its 20-day MA of 17.0, confirming elevated fear.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil +3.91% dragging ISRG -14.15% and JETS -2.53% as energy inflation fears resurface, while gold +0.95% offered no safe-haven bid amid a broad growth selloff.

SIGNALS & WATCH — Fear & Greed 59.8 (neutral). Top movers: TRV +9.22% (Insurance), ISRG -14.15% (Medtech), NFLX -7.26% (New Staples). Best momentum sector: XLE +1.16%; worst: XLC -1.78%. Vol spike tickers: ISRG (4.3x) — distribution (vol up + price down); DBC (5.3x) — accumulation (vol up + price up) tied to commodity inflation. Watch tomorrow: ISRG — today's -14.15% on 4.3x vol spike with price near 52wk low below 200-day MA; XLC — -1.78% on Comcast spinoff uncertainty; USO — +3.91% on blockade catalyst and accumulating on vol spike.
